summary: Replaced all 3 dummy testimonies (placeholder data) with real client data across all 3 i18n files (es, en, zh).
Added 4th testimony (Ricardo Peralta, Costa Rica) with no photo (initials fallback 'RP') across all language files.
Updated src/components/Testimonials.astro to use Firebase Storage image URLs for testimonies 1–3 (Julio.jpg, Marcelo.jpg, Cata.jpg) and correct initials (JC, MS, CC, RP).
The 4th testimony entry was added to the testimonials array with photo: undefined and initials: 'RP'.
Spanish texts in es.ts are original client messages. English and Chinese translations were provided in en.ts and zh.ts respectively.
Ran 'npx astro check' — 0 errors, 0 warnings, 10 pre-existing hints (unchanged).
No structural changes to carousel JS logic or TestimonialCard.astro component.

validation.lint: not applicable (Astro static site, no ESLint configured for this project)
validation.tests: no automated tests required per spec (static i18n content changes)
